title: Create:Now that's a train!
description: Create:Now that's a train! is an Create mod addon that adds various new decorative blocks to make your trains look better!
body:
Want to decorate your train? Well C:NTT is for you! This mod adds decorative blocks for trains!

-Planned features- Revamped pantographs{1.2.0},Bells,steam pipes, headlights,decorative engines

This is an solo project made by the Mystriraft team. Join our server to socialize,see sneak-peeks of the mod or other projects made by our "team". Please note that this mod does not currently have any new functional content planned and it is simply decorative.
